overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grassland. The character passes a large oak tree, a wooden wagon, and a signpost while exploring the rural countryside with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt trail through grassland approaching large oak tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the large oak tree ahead

entered.detail: large spreading oak tree with dense green foliage at the end of the path
worn dirt path through tall green grass
tall green grass covering rolling hills
tall green grass covering rolling hills
hazy mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grassland toward a prominent large oak tree. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the tree, with expansive prairie and distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural crossroads with abandoned wagon and directional signpost

events.description: abandoned wooden wagon comes into view on the left side of the trail
wooden signpost appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing down the dirt path past the tree, approaching a wagon and signpost

entered.detail: old wooden cart abandoned on the grass beside the trail
tall wooden post with directional signs pointing in multiple directions
small wooden building visible in the distant left field

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large tree, the character continues through open grassland where a wooden wagon appears on the left and a signpost emerges on the right. A small cottage is visible in the distant left field as the character approaches the crossroads area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with distant farmstead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the trail away from the signpost toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: small clusters of trees dotting the left hillside
flock of birds flying in the sky above the prairie

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the dirt path through expansive grassland, having left the wagon and signpost behind. The trail stretches ahead toward distant hills with scattered trees visible on the left, while birds fly overhead in the open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from a landmark-focused path into an expansive, open prairie. It begins by following the character from behind as they approach a prominent large oak tree, with distant mountains framing the horizon under a partly cloudy sky. As the character passes the tree, the scene opens up to reveal a wooden wagon on the left and a signpost on the right, while a small cottage appears in the far distance. The camera then continues forward, leaving these markers behind as the trail stretches further into the grassland. Finally, the view expands toward distant hills and scattered trees while birds fly overhead in the open sky.
